page.content: In December 2023, the Cruise passenger volume analysis reveals that CarnivalCorp recorded a passenger volume of 5,000,000 with a YoYChange of 12.3% and a MarketShare of 15.3%, while RoyalCaribbean had 3,500,000 passengers, a YoYChange of 10.5% and a MarketShare of 8.0%.

lines.text: In December 2023, the Cruise passenger volume analysis reveals that CarnivalCorp recorded a passenger volume of 5,000,000
with a YoYChange of 12.3% and a MarketShare of 15.3%, while RoyalCaribbean had 3,500,000 passengers, a YoYChange of
10.5% and a MarketShare of 8.0%.

page.content: NorwegianCruise contributed 2,000,000 passengers with a YoYChange of 8.0% and Others accounted for 1,500,000 passengers, with a YoYChange of 5.0%. The total passenger volume stands at 12,000,000, with a YoYChange of 9.0% and a MarketShare of 2023Forecast at 13,000,000, indicating a YoYChange of 8.3%. Projected MarketShare for the years 2024 through 2028 shows a progressive increase from 54.1% in 2024 to 60.0% in 2028, reflecting a MarketTrends growth rate of 7.5% and a MarketSize of JPY1,200B. In the hospitality sector, Table 2 indicates that Tokyo sold 1,500 units at an AverageDailyRate of 12,000JPY, generating TotalRevenue of 18,000,000JPY with an OccupancyRate of 85% and NumberofListings at 2,000, leading to a MarketShare of 30%. Osaka sold 1,200 units at an AverageDailyRate of 11,500JPY, yielding TotalRevenue of 13,800,000JPY, with a lower OccupancyRate of 78% across 1,800 listings, achieving a MarketShare of 25%. Kyoto recorded 800 units, an AverageDailyRate of 15,000JPY, and TotalRevenue of 12,000,000JPY with an OccupancyRate of 90% and 1,200 listings, achieving a MarketShare of 20%. Fukuoka sold 600 units at 10,000JPY, with TotalRevenue of 6,000,000JPY and an OccupancyRate of 75% across 800 listings, resulting in a MarketShare of 15%.

page.content: Sapporo, with 400 units at an AverageDailyRate of 9,500JPY, generated TotalRevenue of 3,800,000JPY, an OccupancyRate of 70%, and 500 listings, leading to a MarketShare of 10%. Nagasaki had 200 units at 8,000JPY, producing TotalRevenue of 1,600,000JPY with an OccupancyRate of 80% and 150 listings, resulting in a MarketShare of 5%. The total for the regions indicates 4,200 units sold at an AverageDailyRate of 11,250JPY, with TotalRevenue reaching 51,200,000JPY and an OccupancyRate of 81%, supported by 7,000 listings and a MarketShare of 100%, culminating in an Average of 11,250JPY, consistent across TotalRevenue of 51,200,000JPY and an OccupancyRate of 81%.
